nits: spec verify clause explicitly requires vitest coverage of 'PUT-on-draft-staying-draft doesn't register' and 'archive tears down'; neither has an explicit test case despite teardownMock being wired — the behavior is exercised by live e2e DELETE but the unit-test contract is not satisfied
teardownMock is imported and reset between tests but never asserted with toHaveBeenCalled in any test — dead test scaffolding that should be exercised
POST /:id/dry-run silently ignores body.synthetic_payload when triggerIndex is undefined; spec is unambiguous that this is correct, but worth a 400 (or at least a warning log) for caller hygiene

the dry-run INSERT uses ${JSON.stringify(inputs)}::jsonb — works under drizzle (string param then ::jsonb cast), but for consistency with the worker's sql.json fix the convention should be unified across the codebase

verify.log narrates three rebuilds; the flush-hook and sql.json fixes should ideally have surfaced earlier as explicit checkpoints in the plan rather than mid-step discoveries, but both were caught and verified

spec mentioned composio_webhook for live verify (a); test used a schedule trigger — acceptable since reconcileTriggers is the same code path, but a follow-up live test with an actual composio_webhook trigger would close the loop
